# kUSBPowerDuringWakeRevocable

**Enumeration Case**

The system requests power reallocation as revocable.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBPowerDuringWakeRevocable = 6
```

## Discussion

The system uses this extra power while it’s awake, but the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/kernel/usbpowerrequesttypes/kusbpowerrequestwakerelease] message can take that power away and reallocate it to another device.
title: kUSBPowerDuringWakeRevocable
